name: Coordinate Multi-Robot Arm Movements
description: CoppeliaSim is running with the movementViaRemoteApi scene containing 3 robot arms (red, green, blue - each 7-DOF). Write a Python script using the ZMQ Remote API to coordinate all three robots in a synchronized sequence. Steps: 1) Connect via RemoteAPIClient, 2) Get joint handles for all 3 robots (e.g., sim.getObject('/redRobot/joint', {'index': i}) for i in 0-6), 3) Start the simulation with sim.setStepping(True), 4) Move the RED robot to joint configuration [90, 0, 90, 0, 0, 0, 0] degrees using sim.moveToConfig(), 5) Then move the BLUE robot to [0, 90, 0, -90, 0, 90, 0] degrees, 6) Then move the GREEN robot's IK target (sim.getObject('/greenRobot/target')) upward by 0.2m using sim.moveToPose(), 7) Finally, move all 3 robots back to their home positions [0,0,0,0,0,0,0] simultaneously using threading, 8) Stop the simulation and save a screenshot to '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/multi_robot_done.png'. The agent must observe intermediate states via screenshots to verify each robot moved correctly before proceeding to the next step.
